since_last: 90% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.70%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 90% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.53% · Gold -0.47% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 90% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.70%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.70%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at +0.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.39%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.39%, INOD +3.52%, ORCL +3.41%, PLTR +3.29%, AMAT +3.06%. Laggards: DELL -0.83%, MU -0.59%, D -0.42%, AAPL -0.18%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.89% at $156.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.89% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
